name: ngen-admin-dashboard
description: A sleek and fully responsive open-source Bootstrap 5 administration dashboard theme with swipe left event on mobile screens to display the offcanvas. Featuring basic, ready-to-use styled components, interactive data tables, and dynamic charting libraries. Built with clean, semantic HTML5 markup and zero jQuery dependencies, it ensures simple and effortless customization.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:pug && npm run build:scss && npm run build:scripts && npm run build:assets
